#!/bin/bash  
  
set -o pipefail -e  
export PRELAUNCH_OUT="/home/hdoop/hadoop-3.3.4/logs/userlogs/application_1669862098511_0011/container_1669862098511_0011_01_000001/prelaunch.out"

exec 2>"${PRELAUNCH_ERR}"
